title: How Many Wells Remain? | CAPIT
description: Review the data context behind inactive, orphaned, unplugged, and plugged well estimates.
headline: How Many Wells Remain?
body: Counts vary by source, definition, and publication date. CAPIT labels whether a figure refers to unplugged orphaned wells, broader inactive-well estimates, or a source-specific inventory.

sections.heading: Context Before Comparison
sections.body: A good state comparison view does more than rank totals. It should show coverage scope, update cadence, and the agency behind the numbers.

sections.heading: Partial Coverage
sections.body: If a source exposes only partial subsets, CAPIT should say so plainly and avoid implying broader completeness than the visible data supports.
